verse.name: v1
verse.lines: So precious are the promises You’ve given

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Unfailing is the way You’ve kept each one

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: There is nothing I could do to show I’m thankful

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Or repay You for the riches of Your love

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: And it’s You, Lord, it’s You

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: You’re the lover of my soul

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: You’re the one that I adore

verse.name: v10
verse.lines: This deep devotion of my heart
